summary: Transcript evidence suggests drift in the accepted acquisition-to-sales handoff timing.

evidence.excerpt: The handoff now waits for partner review before sales can accept the qualified lead.

drift.was: Sales accepts qualified leads immediately after acquisition qualification.
drift.now: Sales waits for partner review before accepting qualified leads.
drift.reason: The meeting summary suggests a changed operating sequence.

review.reason: Handoff drift changes an interface boundary and requires acquisition owner review.
